animations: ::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb:hover { background: padding-box padding-box rgba(148, 163, 184, 0.42); border: 2px solid rgba(0, 0, 0, 0); border-radius: 10px; }
input:-webkit-autofill:hover { -webkit-text-fill-color: rgb(226, 232, 240); transition: background-color 5000s ease-in-out; box-shadow: rgb(15, 18, 24) 0px 0px 0px 30px inset; }
